title: RAG is table stakes now — what comes after retrieval?
snippet: Every AI application uses RAG. The trend is moving toward agentic retrieval, re-ranking with specialized models, and multi-hop reasoning over knowledge graphs.
author: hn_user_xander

title: Anthropic's contextual retrieval paper changes the RAG landscape
snippet: Contextual retrieval from Anthropic achieves 49% fewer failures. This trend toward chunk-level context is reshaping how everyone builds RAG systems.
author: hn_user_yara
